[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a four-panel collage of the same person taking a close-up selfie with slight hand and head repositioning.

Main Subject:
A person with long, straight reddish-brown hair and a light skin tone is shown from the shoulders up. Their face is angled toward the camera, with brown eyes visible and red lipstick on their mouth. In each panel, one hand is raised near their face, with fingers curled to form a small gesture close to the cheek area; the hand position and finger shape vary slightly between panels. The person’s expression appears neutral to slightly posed, with their gaze directed toward the camera.

Setting:
The background appears indoors with a plain light-colored wall. A dark fabric-covered area is visible behind the person’s left side, resembling a draped garment or folded fabric. Near the top center of the background, a small hanging or clipped item is visible, including a transparent bag-like object containing colorful contents. Lighting is bright and even, suggesting indoor artificial light or a well-lit room.

Visual Details:
The collage is arranged as four vertically stacked panels in a 2x2 layout. The person’s hair falls across the face and shoulders, with a slight shine on the forehead and cheeks. The camera angle is close and slightly tilted, filling most of the frame with the person’s face. The clothing visible at the shoulders includes dark fabric with lighter trim along the edge.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
A four-panel selfie collage shows a person with long reddish-brown hair posing close to the camera. Their hand gesture changes slightly across the panels while the background stays the same.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A collage of four identical close-up selfies of a young East Asian woman with long, auburn hair. She is wearing a black t-shirt and has pink, cat-ear-shaped hair accessories on top of her head. Her facial expression is playful and slightly mischievous, with her lips pursed and her eyes looking to the side with a playful squint. Her hands are raised to her face, with fists clenched in a cute, cat-like pose.

The background is softly blurred, showing what appears to be a closet with dark-colored clothing hanging. On a shelf above the closet, there's a small, clear plastic bag filled with colorful items, possibly toiletries or small trinkets. The lighting is soft and appears to be from an overhead source, creating subtle shadows and highlighting her features. The overall color palette is warm, dominated by the auburn tones of her hair and the soft pink of the hair accessories, contrasted with the dark background. The mood is youthful, playful, and slightly quirky. The image has a slightly grainy, lo-fi aesthetic, common in casual selfies.
